name: @clearline/mock-backend
description: Platform-wide MSW v2 mock backend convention: stateful TypeScript services hold the invariants, MSW handlers are thin HTTP/WebSocket adapters in front of them. See TDR-PLATFORM-001 > technology_decisions.shared_mock_backend_strategy.

metadata.contract_testing: No Pact / consumer-driven contract testing — see TDR-PLATFORM-001 ADR-006 reference and libs/contracts.
